summary: Trends discovery page with debounced search, Product/Creator/Shop tabs, role-aware seller vs affiliate fields, mock data service layer, and market-intel placeholder banner on cross-shop tabs.

interfaceChanges.description: Full discovery UI replacing placeholder shell
Service adapter with UI-only mock routing

mappings.criterion: /trends renders search input and 3 tabs within 1 interaction
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_trends_discovery.test.tsx::renders search input and 3 tabs within one interaction

mappings.criterion: Typing filters results after debounce within active tab
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_trends_discovery.test.tsx::filters product results after debounced search within the active tab

mappings.criterion: Seller vs affiliate Creator/Shop intent fields
UI-only renders mock data with market intel label
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_trends_discovery.test.tsx::loads mock trends via service without API calls
